Module_4 assignment - Flask app db backend with tests

API Reference

  • app — Flask application
  • db_config — database connection settings
    • get_database_url()
    • get_connect_kwargs()
    • connect()
  • query_data — SQL analysis queries
  • load_data — JSON loader
  • create_database — database initialization
Module_4 assignment - Flask app db backend with tests
  • db_config — database connection settings
  • View page source

db_config — database connection settings

Shared PostgreSQL connection settings for the application.

db_config.get_database_url(dbname: str | None = None) → str

Build a PostgreSQL connection URL from environment variables.

Parameters:

dbname (str | None) – Optional database name override.

Returns:

Connection URL suitable for psycopg.connect(conninfo=...).

Return type:

str

db_config.get_connect_kwargs(dbname: str | None = None, **overrides) → dict

Return psycopg connection keyword arguments from the environment.

Parameters:

  • dbname (str | None) – Optional database name override.

  • overrides (object) – Additional connection keyword arguments.

Returns:

Keyword arguments for psycopg.connect.

Return type:

dict

db_config.connect(dbname: str | None = None, **overrides) → Connection

Open a PostgreSQL connection using environment-based settings.

Parameters:

  • dbname (str | None) – Optional database name override.

  • overrides (object) – Additional connection keyword arguments.

Returns:

Active psycopg connection.

Return type:

psycopg.Connection
